ogTitle: Cape Woolamai vs Carag Carag: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cape Woolamai and Carag Carag.
heading: Cape Woolamai vs Carag Carag — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cape Woolamai, Victoria and Carag Carag, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Carag Carag has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Cape Woolamai (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cape Woolamai or Carag Carag safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cape Woolamai has a flood risk score of 45/100, while Carag Carag scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cape Woolamai scores 35/100 for bushfire risk. Carag Carag scores 28/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cape Woolamai or Carag Carag?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Carag Carag has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.33% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
